THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATALE, DAVIDOFF $20,610.86 PRINCIPAL, $2,061.09 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,586.75 INTEREST, $419.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,677.70, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATALE, DAVIDOFF $24,677.70 PRINCIPAL, $23,913.71 INTEREST, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $48,636.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
